creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Aleks from comment #2)

It looked to me like you were trying to upgrade.

My memory is that for some reason for early 10.x's
one had to first update to late 10.x's (counting stable
as an example of late). Then one needed to update again
from late 10.x to 11.x or later.

But I do not remember the details.
